calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Gerald Woods, Esq. for Petitioner: Jonathan Spear, present as Guardian ad litem for: Ariel Spear, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $25,000.00
Medical Expenses $19,484.00
Costs $5,495.74
A net balance of $50,020.26 to be deposited into a blocked account with World Savings Bank, FSB - Sloat Blvd. Branch, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
